steps.title: Find the angle y
steps.content:
The $74^\circ$ angle and the angle above line $q$ on the other side of transversal $s$ form a straight line, so that angle is:
$$180-74=106$$
Because $q \parallel r$, that $106^\circ$ angle corresponds to $y^\circ$. Thus $y=106$.

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content:
Use the given equation $y=2x+8$:
$$106=2x+8$$
$$98=2x$$
$$x=49$$
This matches, so C is correct.
